DOCUMENSO_DB_PASSWORD.description: PostgreSQL password for the documenso database user

DOCUMENSO_SECRET_KEY.description: NextAuth secret — random 32+ char string (openssl rand -hex 32)

DOCUMENSO_ENCRYPTION_KEY.description: AES encryption key for document data — must be exactly 32 chars

DOCUMENSO_ENCRYPTION_KEY_SECONDARY.description: Secondary encryption key for key rotation (optional, defaults to DOCUMENSO_ENCRYPTION_KEY)

DOCUMENSO_SMTP_PORT.description: SMTP port (587 for STARTTLS, 465 for SSL, 25 for plain)

DOCUMENSO_SMTP_PASS.description: SMTP authentication password or app password

DOCUMENSO_SMTP_FROM.description: From address for outgoing emails (e.g. sign@kunde.irongeeks.eu)

DOCUMENSO_SMTP_SECURE.description: Use SSL/TLS (true for port 465, false for STARTTLS on 587)

DOCUMENSO_PORT.description: Host port to bind Documenso to (only needed without Traefik)

DOCUMENSO_OIDC_WELL_KNOWN.description: Authentik OIDC well-known URL (optional, for SSO)

DOCUMENSO_OIDC_CLIENT_ID.description: OIDC client ID from Authentik application

DOCUMENSO_OIDC_CLIENT_SECRET.description: OIDC client secret from Authentik application
